mapper.select:
SELECT id, config_id, tenant_id, success_rate, mock_delay, callback_url, callback_delay, success_response, fail_response, simulate_error, error_code, error_msg, auto_refund, refund_delay, is_deleted, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by FROM pay_config_dummy
AND config_id LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.configId}, '%')
AND tenant_id LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.tenantId}, '%')
AND success_rate LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.successRate}, '%')
